name: PostureCheck
description: PostureCheck schema from Palo Alto Networks SaaS Security Posture Management API

check_id.description: Unique identifier of the posture check result.

app_id.description: ID of the onboarded application this check applies to.

check_name.description: Name of the security posture check.

severity.description: Severity level if the check fails.

status.description: Current result status of the check.

description.description: Description of what the check evaluates.

remediation.description: Step-by-step remediation guidance for failed checks.

compliance_frameworks.description: Compliance frameworks this check maps to (e.g., CIS, SOC2, ISO27001).

last_evaluated_at.description: Timestamp when the check was last evaluated.

suppression_justification.description: Justification text if the check is suppressed.
